name: pir
description: PIR: Plan → Implement → Review with build-verify cycles and two pre-PR human gates (plan-approval, dev-approval), for GitHub-issue-driven work.

pre-spawn.comment-on-issue: On it! Working on this with the PIR protocol (plan + dev-approval gates before PR).

phases.name: Plan
phases.description: Read the issue, investigate the codebase, write codev/plans/<id>-<slug>.md, await plan-approval

phases.name: Implement
phases.description: Write code + tests, run build/test checks, await dev-approval on the running worktree

phases.name: Review
phases.description: Write retrospective (arch + lessons), push, open PR with review as body, run 3-way consultation, then wait at pr gate while the human merges on GitHub

pr_exists.command: gh pr list --state all --head "$(git branch --show-current)" --json number --jq 'length' | grep -q '^[1-9]'
pr_exists.description: PR must be created before signaling completion

review_has_arch_updates.description: Review must include '## Architecture Updates' section (what changed in arch.md, or why no changes needed)

review_has_lessons_updates.description: Review must include '## Lessons Learned Updates' section (what changed in lessons-learned.md, or why no changes needed)

PHASE_COMPLETE.description: Signal current build phase is complete
